SANFRAN_B_DEFEND_FLEET_FAILED: You failed to defend the Fleet!
SANFRAN_B_GUARD_HINT: Cannot plant. Clear the area of enemies.
SANFRAN_B_LASER_HINT: Press^3 [{+actionslot 4}] ^7to designate targets for the orbital laser.
SANFRAN_B_OBJ_LASER: Use the Arclight railguns to destroy the Atlas cargo ships.
SANFRAN_B_OBJ_PLANT_JAMMERS: Plant the Jammers on the Railguns.
SANFRAN_B_OBJ_SECURE_DECK: Secure the deck of the Arrowhead.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_ADS_ATLASHASTAKENT: ^2Kingpin: ^7Atlas has taken the bridge. Arclight security is being compromised. They've bypassed our jammers.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_ADS_AUTHORIZATIONG: ^2Kingpin: ^7Authorization granted, Sentinel one. Put the hurt on em soldier, we can't afford to lose another ship.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_ADS_SENTINELZEROON: ^2Kingpin: ^7Sentinel-zero-one, the carriers weapons system are coming back online.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_ADS_THISISCOMPACFL: ^2Kingpin: ^7Sentinel-zero-one, all enemy ships accounted for and destroyed. Good work, team.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_ADS_THOSEDRONESARE: ^2Kingpin: ^7Those drones are tearing up our fleet. We just lost another boat.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_ALX_CARRIERTECHISS: ^2Alexi: ^7Carrier tech is saying they're almost fixed.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_ALX_THOSEFABSARETE: ^2Alexi: ^7Those Fabs are tearing up our fleet. We just lost another boat.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CMR_HUNTERONESIXYO: ^2Commander: ^7Hunter one-six, you are free to prosecute all targets.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_ADMIRALDAVISRE: ^2Cormack: ^7Kingpin, requesting authorization to engage Arclight. Security code Alpha-Zulu-Tango-Nine-Nine-Seven.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_ALXEIWEREALMOS: ^2Cormack: ^7Alxei, we're almost there. Put me through to the commander of the pacific fleet.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_ATLASISTRYINGT: ^2Cormack: ^7Atlas is trying to take control of the carrier's weapons systems. We need to get jammers on those rail guns and buy our technicians some time.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_DECKISSECUREDW: ^2Cormack: ^7Deck is secured, we're heading to the bridge.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_GETTOTHERAILGU: ^2Cormack: ^7Get to the rail gun and plant the jammer!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_HEHASNTDONEAGO: ^2Cormack: ^7He hasn't done a goddamn thing yet except piss us off! Let's move!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_HOLDSTEADYONTH: ^2Cormack: ^7Hold steady on the cargo ship, Mitchell!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_INEEDYOUTOTARG: ^2Cormack: ^7I need you to target for me, Mitchell! Get on that terminal!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_JAMMERISSET: ^2Cormack: ^7Jammer is set! One more to go!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_KILLYOURBOOSTE: ^2Cormack: ^7Kill your boosters. I don't need anyone breaking their neck.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_LIGHTSOUT: ^2Cormack: ^7Lights out! Switch back to night vision!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_NEXT: ^2Cormack: ^7Next? Irons just murdered thousands of innocent people on U.S. soil. Next, we hunt him down... And we bury him.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_RAILGUNSARESEC: ^2Cormack: ^7Rail guns are secured! We're heading to the bridge!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_SOMEONEGETMEAS: ^2Cormack: ^7Someone get me a sitrep on the carrier's weapons.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_TECHNICIANSARE: ^2Cormack: ^7Technicians are trying to get the carrier's weapons systems online! We need to push the enemy off the deck and buy them some time!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_THEARCLIGHTSAT: ^2Cormack: ^7The arclight satellite is in position. We just need to get to it before Atlas does.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_THEYREGONNATRY: ^2Cormack: ^7They're gonna try and take the ship's bridge. Let's move.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_TWOWARBIRDSCOM: ^2Cormack: ^7Two Warbirds coming in from the west!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_WEHAVETOBREAKT: ^2Cormack: ^7We have to break through to the other side of the hangar deck!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_WENEEDTOGETTO: ^2Cormack: ^7We need to get to the bridge.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_CRK_YOUREOFFTARGET: ^2Cormack: ^7You're off target! Fire on the cargo ship!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_GDN_ALRIGHTLETSSHO: ^2Gideon: ^7Alright, let's show these Navy boys how it's done!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_GDN_ATLASCHOPPERSI: ^2Gideon: ^7Atlas choppers inbound! Tangos are fastzipping in!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_GDN_FUCKINGHELL: ^2Gideon: ^7Fucking hell. There's no turning back from this.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_GDN_HOWTHEHELLDIDI: ^2Gideon: ^7How the hell did Irons do all this?
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_GDN_THATWARBIRDHAS: ^2Gideon: ^7That Warbird has a bead on you! Take cover!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_GDN_USEYOURBOOSTER: ^2Gideon: ^7Use your boosters to gain the high ground!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_GDN_WEVEGOTENEMYTR: ^2Gideon: ^7We've got enemy troops all over the carrier.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_GDN_WEWONTLETTHEMG: ^2Gideon: ^7We won't let them get away with this.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_NVR_FIREEVERYTHING: ^2Naval Commander: ^7Fire everything you've got in grid box Alpha Tango Six Eight Five!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_NVR_IVEGOTEYESONTH: ^2Naval Commander: ^7I've got eyes on thirty to forty assault drones off our starboard side!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_NVR_OURWEAPONSSYST: ^2Naval Commander: ^7Our weapons systems are down! Nothing is responding!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_NVR_WEREGETTINGHIT: ^2Naval Commander: ^7We're getting hit from all sides!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_PLT_COPYTHATWEARET: ^2Pilot: ^7Copy that, we are two klicks out flying at cherubs three, over.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_PLT_THISISHUNTERON: ^2Pilot: ^7This is Hunter one-six, moving to engage multiple FABs in your AO, over.
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_SC1_MICHAELSKEEPYO: ^2Security Officer 1: ^7Michaels, keep your goddamn head down!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_SC1_WHOTHEHELLAREY: ^2Security Officer 1: ^7Who the hell are you guys?
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_SC2_MOREOFTHEMBYTH: ^2Security Officer 2: ^7More of them by the loading bay!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_SN1_CASEVACUNITSAR: ^2Sentinel Operative 1: ^7Casevac units are inbound! They need number and type!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_SN1_GETALLSECURITY: ^2Sentinel Operative 1: ^7Get all security personnel armed and on deck!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_SN1_INEEDALLAVAILA: ^2Sentinel Operative 1: ^7I need all available Coast Guard units in our AO immediately!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_SN1_OPENFIREONTHOS: ^2Sentinel Operative 1: ^7Open fire on those cargo ships!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_SN2_CLEAREVERYONEO: ^2Sentinel Operative 2: ^7Clear everyone off the bridge now!
SUBTITLE_SANFRANB_SFB_SN2_TELLTHEMITSINT: ^2Sentinel Operative 2: ^7Tell them it's in the goddamn hundreds, maybe more!
